positive: A highly detailed, stylized celestial and botanical pattern. The composition must be centrally balanced, featuring abstract, interconnected forms of crescent moons, stars, cosmic dust trails, and stylized floral elements (like lotuses and ferns). The style should be a fusion of ornate Art Nouveau linework and modern geometric abstraction. Use strong, deep indigo and midnight blue as the primary background colors, accented vividly with metallic gold and copper tones for the foreground elements. The lines must be crisp, clean, and bold, creating a high-contrast silhouette effect that reads well on apparel. Include subtle radial symmetry and repeating elements suitable for a seamless wrap pattern or central chest placement. Minimalist yet richly detailed, perfect for commercial print.
negative: blurry, low resolution, text, signature, watermark, logo, poorly drawn, artifact, jpeg artifacts, grayscale, solid color, cartoon, sketch, messy lines, extra limbs, bad anatomy
